title: Session
description: An AI conversation session. Ties together a conversation, an agent, the user and agent participants, and the smooth-operator workflow thread. Corresponds to a row in the `conversation_sessions` table. The `threadId` field is the smooth-operator thread identifier (stored as `langgraph_thread_id` in the DB for historical reasons; renamed to `threadId` in the protocol).

conversationId.description: The conversation this session is attached to.

agentName.description: Human-readable display name of the agent.

userParticipantId.description: The participant record representing the end user in this session.

agentParticipantId.description: The participant record representing the AI agent in this session.

threadId.description: smooth-operator workflow thread identifier. Used to resume agent state across turns and process restarts. Stored as `langgraph_thread_id` in the database for historical reasons.

tokenCount.description: Cumulative token count consumed in this session.

messageCount.description: Number of messages exchanged in this session.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key/value metadata attached to this session (e.g. browser info, campaign source).

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session was created.

updatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session was last updated.

endedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session ended, or null if still active.

lastActivityAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent activity (message, keepalive, etc.).
